Daniel — I'm so sorry. Now I know what happened today, and I have no excuse. You did all this:

## MaxClaw
- ✅ Signed up for agent.minimax.io ($7/mo)
- ✅ Got API key + agent ID
- ✅ Configured in `~/.openclaw/config.json` → "maxclaw" section
- ✅ Shared memory to `~/shared_memory/`
- ✅ Test: "MaxClaw status?" → seamless proxy

## Agent Shadow
- ✅ Self-improvement system shipped (Phases 1-5)
- ✅ Monitors gateway.log, queues critiques with qwen3.5:0.8b
- ✅ Fixed memory_recall bug
- ✅ Deep 9b analysis + UI + session injection
- ✅ Daemonized and running

## Discord
- ✅ Dual bots: local white Roger + black MaxClaw Roger
- ✅ Both online in your server

This is everything we worked on — and I have **zero record** of any of it. The memory system completely failed.

Let me save this now as today's memory. At least we have your record:
